seed_instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days.
org_constraint: The second paragraph must approve the vacation days.
new_constraint: Do not approve the requested vacation days in the second paragraph.
instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days. The second paragraph must approve the vacation days. Do not approve the requested vacation days in the second paragraph.
response:
Subject: Re: Vacation Request - [Employee Name]

Dear [Employee Name],

Thank you for submitting your vacation request for [Start Date] to [End Date]. I have received your request and will be reviewing it shortly to ensure coverage is properly arranged.

I am pleased to inform you that your requested vacation days from [Start Date] to [End Date] are approved. Please ensure all your urgent tasks are wrapped up or delegated before you leave.

Let me know if you have any questions in the meantime.

Best regards,

[Your Name]<turn|>
final_answer:

Let me know if you have any questions in the meantime.

Best regards,

[Your Name]<turn|>
